Name: HIT_BACK_PARAM
Description: Defines recoil distance and stagger duration values for different attack deflection strength levels.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Recoil Distance: Very Small
Fields.Description: Recoil movement distance applied for extremely weak attack deflections.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Stagger Duration: Very Small
Fields.Description: Stagger or recovery duration applied for extremely weak attack deflections.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Recoil Distance: Small
Fields.Description: Recoil movement distance applied for weak attack deflections.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Stagger Duration: Small
Fields.Description: Stagger or recovery duration applied for weak attack deflections.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Recoil Distance: Medium
Fields.Description: Recoil movement distance applied for standard attack deflections.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Stagger Duration: Medium
Fields.Description: Stagger or recovery duration applied for standard attack deflections.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Recoil Distance: Large
Fields.Description: Recoil movement distance applied for strong attack deflections.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Stagger Duration: Large
Fields.Description: Stagger or recovery duration applied for strong attack deflections.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Recoil Distance: Very Large
Fields.Description: Recoil movement distance applied for extremely strong attack deflections.

Fields.Name: Attack Deflection Stagger Duration: Very Large
Fields.Description: Stagger or recovery duration applied for extremely strong attack deflections.
